official_pick_rules.note: Lab Rating is setup quality. It is not win probability. Official picks require both strong win probability and strong setup quality.

summary: No official picks cleared the stricter rules. 0 value-watch setups and 6 watchlist games remain research-only. 0 games reached a Lab Rating of 75+ but did not clear every official gate.

games.game: Boston Red Sox @ New York Mets

lab_score_breakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

games.read: Boston Red Sox remains on the watchlist. Lab Rating 7.4/10: model edge 35, pitcher 16.25, bullpen 3.04, market 15, base 5. LyDia projects 68.1% against a 50.6% no-vig market number, a 17.6% model edge at -107. Boston Red Sox owns the starting pitcher edge by 13 points. Bullpen read: Adds caution.

model_v3.note: shadow A/B — does not drive picks

pick_team.label: High risk
pick_team.workload_read: Heavy recent workload. Late-game pitching condition could materially affect the read.
pick_team.score_reason: High risk (8.2/10): 13 relief innings over the last three days — 5.3 of them in the last game, 3 arms pitched back-to-back days, allowing 1 run. 11 reliever appearances in the window.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.
